recommendations.title: The Kangaroo Chronicles
recommendations.overview: A communist kangaroo moves in with an artist in Berlin.

recommendations.title: Break
recommendations.overview: Lucie, a young dancer suffers an accident. When she wakes up from a coma, she and her partner start training for a dance show. On the way, she starts looking for her estranged father, a path that might lead her to life-changing love.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: Camille Rewinds
recommendations.overview: Camille was only sixteen and still in high school when she fell in love with Eric, another student. They later married and a child and were happy for a while. But now twenty-five years have passed and Eric leaves her for a younger woman. Bitter and d

recommendations.title: The Tomb of Ligeia
recommendations.overview: Verden Fell is shattered after the death of his lovely wife. But, after an unexpected encounter with Lady Rowena Trevanion, Fell soon finds himself married again. Nevertheless, his late wife's spirit seems to hang over the dilapidated abbey that Fell

recommendations.title: Senior Year
recommendations.overview: A 37-year-old woman wakes up from a 22-year coma, and returns to the high school where she was once a popular cheerleader to finish her senior year and become prom queen.

recommendations.title: Buffalo Soldiers
recommendations.overview: A criminal subculture operates among U.S. soldiers stationed in West Germany just before the fall of the Berlin wall.

recommendations.title: Fixed
recommendations.overview: After learning he's getting neutered, a dog has 24 hours to squeeze in one last balls-to-the-wall adventure with the boys.

recommendations.title: Léolo
recommendations.overview: The story of an imaginative boy who pretends he is the child of a sperm-laden Sicilian tomato upon which his mother accidentally fell.

recommendations.title: The Unthinkable
recommendations.overview: Sweden faces a mysterious attack while Alex tries to reunite with his youth love, Anna.
